payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Anyway! Welcome! Laura will be here shortly; she's in traffic coming from her session, so she'll be joining us as soon as she gets here. Probably next 30 minutes or so. In the meantime, let's go ahead and hop into our announcements for the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello, everyone, and welcome to Critical Role, where a bunch of us nerdy-ass voice actors sit around and play Dungeons & Dragons! I got Liam back via Skype, somehow after many episodes of him fucking with me. I'm happy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Payback's a bitch, huh, buddy?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: WonderCon is in two days, for us! It's this weekend in Anaheim; we're going to be there Saturday, at 2PM to 3PM at The Arena to do our Talks Machina live panel, with a bunch of us up there. With delivery coffee for Taliesin.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That was so-- That was new.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you very much, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: New character.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And thank you, Loot Crate, for sponsoring this chaos. All right, let's get this going. We put up a survey starting this week to try and get a feel for the community at large of you guys. Get a feel for who's watching, where they're watching it from, what kind of future merch ideas you might want to see from the show. We want to get a scope of what the Critter base is, where it comes from, and how many of you are out there. So, if you get a chance, if you haven't yet, go to geekandsundry.com/crsurvey. We're running it until April 18th, so get on there and let us know about you!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty short and you can do it during the break, maybe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I did it in a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's pretty short, pretty easy.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I will give you the piece of paper, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But the rest of us are normal, right? Because we don't have Alter Self anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So if anyone asks, we belong to her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grog--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For 30 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, fine. 30. Very expensive.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So, as you guys make your way down into the main chamber, there's one more devilish entity that's in the process of feasting on what looks to be a small cauldron of some sort of broken bone and dark purple and bluish flesh, and it's just tearing into it, as Ipkesh is at the same table where you guys previously spoke with him. He's sitting there with his same glass of wine, and as you approach, he gives a nod towards you, and he has a piece of paper on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is this just to peruse?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He slides it forward. "Have a read. See if it's up to your preferences."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: May I?

payload.raw_text: Yeah, in perpetuity. So, you don't have to decide now on the other pacts, but at some point down the road, if you're ever in a situation where you're like, 'oh shit, we're all about to die, I 'invoke the second pact,' boom, you get a bunch of devils to help you for the next month.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: So, like, we went in to buy a car, and he's also offering us a condo and land in Florida, at the same time, is that about it?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah, you don't have to accept--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, in perpetuity. So, you don't have to decide now on the other pacts, but at some point down the road, if you're ever in a situation where you're like, 'oh shit, we're all about to die, I 'invoke the second pact,' boom, you get a bunch of devils to help you for the next month.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In theory, only one person has to accept the contract.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To lock this in, you only agree to the first pact. And when the first pact is complete, you do not have to trigger any of the other pacts. The contract remains in effect. Should you ever decide to trigger the pact, it immediately comes into play.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So, second pact is  we get a bunch of devils, and they get to install two in a place of divine worship to be determined. Third pact is: we get all sorts of devil magic in exchange for our souls.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we're probably not going to do those pacts-- (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just don't do those ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So, like, we went in to buy a car, and he's also offering us a condo and land in Florida, at the same time, is that about it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you don't have to accept--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In perpetuity, though.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You've got 25 minutes before your spell is up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He has taken a scan of the group, but he doesn't seem to be flinching. He is just there and eager to talk some more.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's Vegas, man. He don't give a fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think indifference is the common courtesy here to an awful lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, as you guys exit the establishment into the street, the heated cobblestone still glowing a dull maroon and black, you watch as what looks to be some sort of strange mist-like form emanates from a crack, and turns into a screaming specter that-- (gasping) -- and drifts further down the street, past you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lovely.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They need a tourism board. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Badly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What do you guys wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What are we trying to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're just going to walk around and see if we can sense where this bastion of death is.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, it's taken a while to find this place so you're about ten minutes before your spell ends. This is a very big city, you guys. So as you walk-- This is the only thing you've seen so far that looks to have any sort of, loosely welcoming or not, heavily guarded 'don't come in or you'll get killed'-type exterior. And as you enter the low-lit inside, you see these rickety-looking shelves that contain small glowing gems or crystals of different colors and sizes. Like weird geodes that are cut from natural deposits. And across the way, there is just a stool and what looks to be some sort of humanoid creature that is slumped forward and breathing heavily. With these elongated, dull green color on the skin, a series of small spines that protrude from the shoulders and back--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you got pissed on by a bear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah, that's what I was talking about!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who by the way-- He's back in my necklace by the way. I don't want Trinket walking around here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I assumed you didn't want a giant bear walking around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What are we calling the two of you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wode. You can call me Wode.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wode?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wode.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's somehow worse, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I guess I'm Wade

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm never going to-- Wode and Wade?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wode and Wade!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What the shit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What? No Bill and Ted? All right. Wode and Wade. My word!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wode, and Wade, Yrat--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Freddie.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And you can call me Minxie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Minxie.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And this is Greg over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Greg.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: By the way, our 25 minutes is quickly ticking down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, imagine this is happening quickly, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is happening quickly as we enter the shop. We all enter the shop.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You don't know how old it is or how long it's been there, but it is magical.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so it's useless to us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Maybe. Not everything you encounter is going to be useful, guys!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah no, that's fine, that's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's to relay information back to whoever's wearing it? Or to him specifically?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To whoever has the other object that's paired with this that you don't know what that is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We found a single walkie-talkie.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Essentially.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tary, is that thing working right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it working right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I -- Detect Magic on it? Is it--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is magical, it is functional.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As far as I know, someone is watching this right now.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "1500 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We hear you utter our description to anyone, and you will never see anything again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, no, no."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't we want the purple gobstopper?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We've got plenty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's coin around here, though. We might need it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His hands clasp together, overlapping in front of him. He's looking up at you with this new grin, almost like, now there's been a moment of acceptance or a moment of some sort of, in his eyes, a union.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If you minions would like to buy the purple stone with your allowance--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, motherfucker.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: -- the mistress grants you, you may.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How much for the pretty?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks so much, mistress.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perhaps you would like to shift back to your normal form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're welcome, young Wade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The creature's looking very confused, but nevertheless eager to listen. "For the purple stone --"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's been probably, if you start resting fairly soon, it will have been maybe four to five hours after you used this-- or ate the Feast. With the eight hours' full rest, you're still looking at almost half a day left. It's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stealth in, kill a pit fiend. Done it before, we can do it again. Okay, I'm confident about this plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How did we do it-- Wait, wait, wait. Let's just remember, how did we do it last time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How did we do it last time?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We bumblefucked our way into it, got super super lucky--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And bumblefucked our way out of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Was he weak to anything that we remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nothing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But he was extremely frightening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And smart. Very smart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so definitely do a Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And poison.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can do-- Nope, nope, I can't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys technically are still under the effects of a Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but we won't be when we go to fight him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Depends on how soon you get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Feast lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So if we rest--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's been probably, if you start resting fairly soon, it will have been maybe four to five hours after you used this-- or ate the Feast. With the eight hours' full rest, you're still looking at almost half a day left. It's up to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stealth in, kill a pit fiend. Done it before, we can do it again. Okay, I'm confident about this plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How did we do it-- Wait, wait, wait. Let's just remember, how did we do it last time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How did we do it last time?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We bumblefucked our way into it, got super super lucky--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And bumblefucked our way out of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Was he weak to anything that we remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nothing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But he was extremely frightening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And smart. Very smart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so definitely do a Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And poison.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can do-- Nope, nope, I can't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys technically are still under the effects of a Feast.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but we won't be when we go to fight him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Depends on how soon you get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Feast lasts for 24 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So if we rest--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Not since the beginning, yeah. All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or eating souls.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't judge it until you try it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did that use up all of the boar meat? Or am I down to like a quarter of a boar meat now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How much did you have?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Half a boar meat. I have no idea what that means.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Half a boar?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Half a boar meat? Half a boar, between all of you guys, including Grog's appetite, I'd say that's about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That boar is gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Damn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's like Super Nintendo lingo. Can I have half a boar meat?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's the worst eraser. It just made a pink smudge across the page.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's the worst.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You'd like to try my eraser?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, this one's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Wow, we just had a very Oregon Trail moment. I'm proud of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Look at us using rations!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We've never done that before.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. So, for the first leg of this journey, as you're watching as Vasa is darting from edge to edge and occasionally almost dematerializing and turning invisible. And for a moment you have to stop and look around, and then you watch his form appear off in the distance and shoot up a tiny little lit flare to gather your attention once any large Whisperers pass overhead. And this process of rubberbanding behind Vasa continues over the next half an hour or so, going deeper and deeper into the city. And as you go, Vex, you're keeping a pretty close watch on where you're coming from, though you're also seeing large groups of lemures, which is how it's pronounced as I've been corrected and I'm so glad it's pronounced that and not lemurs, because that sounds awful as hell. It's lemure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He talks?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have spoken with an imp before. And the imp (fwsh) out the window, grabs onto the side of the doorframe, and then scurries onto the outside and turns back around and looks inside. "Come. Come."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We go. We follow.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will lead us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we need Pass Without A Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I cast Pass Without A Trace on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm Alter Selfing into my tiefling form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. That being the case, you guys step outside onto the street and you watch as Vasa disappears down the same alleyway that you previously had nearly been assaulted in, Keyleth. You guys, I need you all to make stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. No, add ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Motherfucker. Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Two in a row.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. That takes a minute to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you head down this alleyway, and you guys are parallel following on the side, watching this from a distance, but staying out of sight, without making yourselves visible. Percival, you look up and you see this strange, eerie green glow that begins to drift in your direction. You watch as these spectral arms begin to drift up out of the ground, and this elongated horrifying face pulls up from underneath the darkened cobblestones of the street. And this specter entity drifts in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Do I recognize what this specter entity is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's some sort of a ghost-like creature. You've seen a number of these emanating and drifting through the city, some in small clusters, some individually. They seem to wander aimlessly throughout.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am whispering the incantation for Invisibility into a coin.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No. It is aware that there are threats in its vicinity, so it's not a surprise attack. But it does not see you, so you have advantage on the attack. It is considered a Sneak Attack if you hit it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Shut up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So what you do is, it splats against it, and you watch it (choking noise), it gets stuck and sapped into it. It's moving now at half pace, it's having to pull through this substance that's glued to its feet and it's trying to tear away.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's all I got.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I got a 46 on stealth, can I--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You turn around the corner now and you see, first off, Taryon appears, because when you throw the bag it breaks your invisibility.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's an attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit. Okay, it's worth it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So now you see Percival and Taryon both appear, and this one impish creature is now currently partially glued to a wall and is fighting, trying to pull its way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's run!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It looks like a target. Whisper.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: With a 46 stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. So go ahead and roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would this be a surprise, if I'm that stealthed?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. The impish creature that was distracted by your stone is now attempting to catch up. I want the three of you to make one more stealth check, since you've all revealed yourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How much damage is the first attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 damage? It's Sneak Attack, because it didn't see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait no, it is Sneak Attack, right? Thanks. 12, 25, 27, 33, 35, 42, plus psychic damage from that, 42, so 45.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So right as it's pulling away from this tanglefoot bag, this explosion of glue, it's like (rasping noise), and the dagger just slips through it, and you watch as it goes in four different pieces and retracts into the tanglefoot bag muck once more. It got completely shredded, and the sections are withdrawn back and stuck to it as it is slowly now dribbling out of this massive glue on the side of the building, which is now starting to bubble from the heat from the side of this structure.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Tar pits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take this opportunity to try and turn another corner.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A few moments later, Vasa brings you to the outside of a large jet-black metallic and stone structure. A heavy thick-walled stronghold with a series of what looks like-- imagine a thick bramble forest made of twisted iron that surrounds the base of it, about five feet high. There are small gaps where you guys can try and squeeze through, for the more lithe folk. Grog, you're not quite sure how you're going to get over this without tearing bits of you apart. There's about a ten foot gap between this strange metal bramble fence, and the outside of this stronghold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Freddie, you can't end up here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: She's not naked, she's wearing basic cloth clothing, but a lot of it has been torn and soaked deep, deep crimson with blood. A lot of it appears to be torn from stress and tension. There are claw marks from all over this chamber, from various demonic entities that have torn through here, but the table she's on as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And the dwarf appears alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. There's a woman dwarf in the room ahead of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is she dangerous?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hard to say, I don't think so, but I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does she look familiar?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we go in and look?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys all quietly make your way into the chambers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So quietly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to inch ahead of everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Does she look like she regrets her decisions in life?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does she look like she belongs here? Is she naked?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does she have any unfortunate tattoos?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so, this going to be a surprise-- Not a surprise round, it knows you guys are there, but this-- this is going to be a roll for initiative. Everyone, roll some initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, are you an alchemist?

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: It wasn't my chemistry set.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you hear a (click) sound and a door beginning to open on the north end of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, hide! Hide under the table!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I fall flat on the floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I go still as a statue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make stealth checks, Taryon and Grog with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we still have Pass Without a Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we still have Pass Without a Trace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 19 for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A 19 and a 20. A natural 19 and a natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With disadvantage, you got a 19? Holy shit! Oh, plus-- yeah, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Am I joining in here? Or can I just get back on the table?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get on the table if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: All right, so I get back on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, but you do it noisily.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I flop down on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So the door opens, and as it does--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, oh god. Ah! Oh my god, oh my god, oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a map, it's a map!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A creature comes through, similar to Ipkesh, another humanoid, this one a little thicker, burlier, with a medium-grey hair that is kind of a tangled mass all into dreads right past the shoulders. Big, leathery red wings, red skin, horns at the front, and has a big sword it kind of is pulling out of a sheath on the side of it as it comes in, looking around the room. Which-- Immediately kind of steps into the chamber, as you guys all hide off to the side. "Shit!" And is going to turn around and just go running in the opposite direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No! I shoot an arrow in the back of his neck.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You rush in. The one that was initially left is slaughtered on the ground, but as you rush past, stepping over its corpse, you see another fleshy mass lemure, the creatures that have been following you around since you got here.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I have a question for you real quick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: I have the words, "Reroll is +25 on weapon" written on here, under Great Weapon Fighting, what does that mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That means, if you want to, on an attack, you can take minus five to hit to add ten to damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a gamble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's Great Weapon Master. And then you have Great Weapon Fighting, you can reroll any ones or twos that you roll for damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, yeah, okay. Oh yeah, that's what it says, it says, "Reroll ones and twos," not "Reroll is +25." That is confusing handwriting from me. My bad. I'm just going to charge in as a bear, and in the dark, I can go ten more feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because it's low light.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: So I can go 45 feet? I assume they haven't gone that far. Can I catch up with them?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Farther in the dark?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. I will say, if you don't move, Grog is blocking a large portion of this space so I'll give you disadvantage on the attack even though the creature's very easy to see.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18, okay. You feel an influence begin to press into your brain, drawing you into a strange brain space, and you clench your eyes and force it out, your will strong enough to resist the effect. Upon seeing this fail, and your vision go clear, it glances about and sees everyone else charging into the room, and then backs up again into the chamber this way, that far with the rest of their movement, and that's as far as they get.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we're alerting the whole god damned house.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We gotta eventually get a candle on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A handle, or a candle?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: A handle and a candle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That brings us to Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, I can't see too well from here, so, from where I am, crashed in front of my sister, do I see the lemure?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. And am I within 60 feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are indeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to chuck Whisper at it.
